summary: AE1 gallery created with six Figthus-native editorial illustrations saved under examples/images and figthus/assets/examples.
AE2 README and prompt examples updated to show the native gallery and real Figthus usage patterns.
AE3 canonical reference moved to v2 with 裂开了 and 胶带粘回 states.
AE4 legacy Xiaohei assets remain isolated as provenance/reference material and are not used as the public native gallery.
AE5 release QA passed: markdown image links resolve, expected image files are nonempty, and tplan schema check passes.
Stage 2 GitHub issues #7-#11 and milestone were closed after commit b2c3de9 was pushed.

payload.closed_milestone: Stage 2 - Native examples and release polish
